data.body:
Goal:
Make Foolery treat Knots `gate` items according to workflow ownership rather than beat type. Agent-owned queued gate items should be claimable and runnable in the GUI and API. Human-owned gate items should remain non-claimable and surface through Escalations.

Verification:
1. Run targeted tests covering `canTakeBeat`, ready-route behavior, and gate action affordances; confirm agent-owned queued gate beats are allowed while human-owned gate beats stay blocked.
2. Open the relevant view/component tests and confirm Escalations still keys off `requiresHumanAction`, not `type`.
3. Run full repo quality gates in the dedicated worktree: `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, and `bun run build`.

Constraints:
- Implement in `/Users/cartine/foolery/.worktrees/foolery-gate-owner-claimability`.
- Do not change notification-bell behavior unless later requested.
- Do not move the knot to a terminal state unless explicitly instructed.
data.title: Honor gate owner claimability in GUI and API
